text: Hi, I just heard about Pop. Do you actually work for small businesses? I run a hair salon in the Mission.
Hola Sofía 👋 Yes — Mom & Pop shops are exactly who I was built for. What's the biggest thing slipping right now?
Everything. My Instagram DMs are 27 unread. I lost 3 bridal leads last month because I couldn't reply in time. And I haven't posted in 11 days.
I can fix that today. Can I read your @sol_y_trenza inbox?
Done. I see 27 DMs — 9 booking requests, 6 bridal inquiries (one for September), 3 quinceañera follow-ups. I just drafted replies for all 27. Want to see them before I send?
wait, you can do all that?
And more. I also looked at your Yelp + Google. 4 reviews are unreplied, including a 2-star from Stephanie about the booking process. I drafted a response that owns the problem and offers her a comp.
ok this is unreal. what's the catch?
No catch. Everything I read goes into YOUR private GBrain — you own it forever. If you ever stop using me, you keep every conversation. Want to see what your week looks like with me?
